Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

Driver DCM X95 SLOT v4.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 705
Recv ID: 725
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: A5
Func Name: DDCM

  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 4,
    "replybytes": "59020000000000",
    "sentbytes": "1902FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7

        "bitoffset": 5

        "firstbyte": 7,

      },

        "ref": true,

      },

      },

        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 6,

        "bitoffset": 4,

        "bitoffset": 3,

        "ref": true,

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 7,

        "bitoffset": 6,

        "bitoffset": 4,

        "bitoffset": 3,

      },

        "firstbyte": 10,
        "endian": "Little"
      },

        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
      },
      "UnfoldStatePass": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Little"
